note: Defines the business segments and reports 2025 AUC/A, assets under custody, AUM, revenue, net income, competitive context, and segment capabilities.

note: Summarizes Northern Trust's asset servicing, investment management, and wealth management positioning.

note: Describes the Asset Servicing business, including whole-office solutions, data, digital assets, securities services, fund services, and institutional operations.

note: Documents securities servicing functions such as global custody, tax services, derivatives processing, fund services, and the digitization of custody workflows.

note: Describes Northern Trust's data aggregation, data enhancement, analytics, reporting, performance, risk, and data management services.

note: Provides evidence for Northern Trust's digital asset, tokenization, delivery-versus-payment, and digital/traditional market integration work.

title: Hyperledger Fabric Documentation - Introduction
note: Documents Fabric as an open-source enterprise-grade permissioned distributed ledger platform with modular consensus, known participants, smart contracts, and private data capabilities.

title: Open Data Platform | OpenBB
note: Documents OpenBB's open-source financial data integration platform, local-first approach, security posture, and multiple consumption layers.

title: ghostfolio/ghostfolio
note: Open-source wealth management software with self-hosting, portfolio tracking, privacy, data ownership, and AGPL-3.0 licensing.

title: actualbudget/actual
note: Open-source local-first personal finance app with public development, MIT licensing, self-hosted and local deployment paths, and active releases.

title: Actual Budget
note: Documents Actual Budget's local-first design, data ownership, optional end-to-end encryption, budgeting, reporting, and self-hosted sync capabilities.
